title: Hyde Out
overview: In the gripping cinematic tale, "Hyde Out," an ill-fated heist forces three felons to be on the run from the relentless pursuit of the law. With the local authorities hot on their trail, they find refuge within the seemingly ordinary home of Emily and Joe, an unsuspecting married couple. What starts off as a frantic attempt to escape imminent capture swiftly escalates into an unforeseen sequence of events. As hidden truths are revealed and loyalties tested, Emily is forced to confront her hidden demons, navigating a treacherous path to self-preservation throughout the ominous night.
